# YOUR CODE HERE
def main():
    import sys
    input = sys.stdin.read
    S = input().strip()
    unique_substrings = set()

    n = len(S)
    for i in range(n):
        for j in range(i + 1, n + 1):
            substring = S[i:j]
            unique_substrings.add(substring)

    print(len(unique_substrings))

if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
